method.name: deterministic_structured_error_clustering
method.rationale: The current vaBench baseline already has structured evaluator status, primary attribution, root-cause labels, checker evidence, forms, and categories. This report therefore uses deterministic rules first, instead of an unsupervised embedding pass, so each cluster is directly auditable.
method.cvdp_alignment: CVDP clusters failed cases after LLM reflection and embeddings. For vaBench we keep the same goal, failure-family analysis, but use evaluator evidence as the primary signal. A future residual analysis can add sentence embeddings for B99/C99 rows or for deeper behavior subclusters.

cluster_summaries.label: Static transfer/reference/RF/power macro behavior
cluster_summaries.interpretation: The candidate compiles but misses an analog static transfer, reference, regulation, or RF/AFE macromodel contract.
cluster_summaries.recommended_action: Use checker evidence to inspect whether the prompt underspecified operating points; otherwise count as model circuit-behavior failure.

cluster_summaries.label: State/reset/enable/stuck-output behavior
cluster_summaries.interpretation: The candidate output is stuck or mishandles reset, enable, hold, release, or lock state.
cluster_summaries.recommended_action: Audit prompt state contracts and checker windows; then treat remaining rows as state-machine or initialization failures.

cluster_summaries.label: Event/timing/stimulus coverage behavior
cluster_summaries.interpretation: The generated DUT/TB misses required clocks, edges, pulse windows, phase windows, or stimulus coverage.
cluster_summaries.recommended_action: Inspect whether edge counts and timing windows are explicit in public prompts; this cluster is sensitive to prompt observability.

cluster_summaries.label: Decision/code/quantization sequence behavior
cluster_summaries.interpretation: The generated model produces the wrong comparator decisions, code sequence, DAC/ADC levels, or residue/quantization schedule.
cluster_summaries.recommended_action: Use row-level evidence for manual circuit review; these rows usually reflect functional reasoning failures.

cluster_summaries.label: Calibration/DEM/control algorithm behavior
cluster_summaries.interpretation: The generated model misses trim direction, deadband behavior, DEM rotation, calibration search, or controller sequencing.
cluster_summaries.recommended_action: These are high-value failures for L2/L1-control claims; inspect whether algorithmic steps are fully specified.

cluster_summaries.label: Dynamic response/filter/baseband behavior
cluster_summaries.example_evidence: lowpass_samples=0.627,0.865,0.982,0.999 input_step=True monotonic=True response_fast_enough=True not_instant=False bounded=False
cluster_summaries.interpretation: The candidate compiles but misses time-domain response shape such as settling, lag, integration, slew limiting, or envelope behavior.
cluster_summaries.recommended_action: Check whether the public prompt names required dynamic observables; if yes, this is model dynamic-behavior failure.

cluster_summaries.label: Sample/hold/aperture/droop behavior
cluster_summaries.interpretation: The candidate misses sampling instant, hold value, aperture delay, droop/leakage, or acquisition-window behavior.
cluster_summaries.recommended_action: Check prompt timing contracts first; otherwise count as model sampled-analog-memory failure.

cluster_summaries.label: Verilog-A local/embedded declaration placement
cluster_summaries.example_evidence: ERROR: Failed to compile Verilog-A file higher_order_filter.va: Parse error at L64:13: Spectre-incompatible local declaration inside analog/procedural statement; move declarations to module scope
cluster_summaries.interpretation: The candidate uses Spectre-incompatible local or embedded declarations inside analog/procedural statements.
cluster_summaries.recommended_action: This is a model Verilog-A subset failure; public/wrapper rules already need to discourage this pattern.

cluster_summaries.label: Guarded transition() contribution
cluster_summaries.example_evidence: ERROR: Failed to compile Verilog-A file soft_hysteretic_limiter.va: Spectre-incompatible Verilog-A: transition() contribution is inside a conditional/event/loop/case statement
cluster_summaries.interpretation: The candidate places transition() contributions inside conditional/event/loop/case control.
cluster_summaries.recommended_action: This is a model Verilog-A/Spectre subset failure and an EVAS/Spectre compatibility rule to keep explicit.

cluster_summaries.label: Restricted cross/operator placement
cluster_summaries.example_evidence: ERROR: Failed to compile Verilog-A file debounce_latch.va: Module debounce_latch uses Spectre-restricted operator(s) cross inside a conditionally executed statement. Move these operators out of if/case branches.
cluster_summaries.interpretation: The candidate uses cross or another restricted analog operator inside conditionally executed code.
cluster_summaries.recommended_action: This is a model Verilog-A subset failure; future prompts can keep the operator-placement rule in the wrapper/EVAS rules.

cluster_summaries.label: Indexed/vector procedural syntax
cluster_summaries.example_evidence: ERROR: Failed to compile Verilog-A file v2b_4b.va: Parse error at L64:20: Expected ASSIGN, got IDENT ('i')
cluster_summaries.interpretation: The candidate emits indexed analog/vector/procedural syntax that the evaluator/Spectre parser rejects.
cluster_summaries.recommended_action: Treat as a syntax/subset failure unless a row-specific checker indicates an extraction bug.

cluster_summaries.label: Spectre testbench instance/source syntax
cluster_summaries.example_evidence: ERROR: Failed to parse tb_segmented_dac_ref.scs: Spectre instance/source syntax expects exactly one name before the node list; got '* Stimulus for binary bits: b0'
cluster_summaries.interpretation: The candidate testbench has malformed Spectre instance, source, include, or save syntax.
cluster_summaries.recommended_action: This is model TB-generation failure when wrapper extraction/staging is already ruled out.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsupported event-loop/timer form
cluster_summaries.interpretation: The candidate uses an event-loop form unsupported by the current evaluator/Spectre-compatible subset.
cluster_summaries.recommended_action: Keep as model subset failure unless an EVAS core regression reproduces a Spectre-accepted construct.

cluster_summaries.label: Incomplete generation under fixed output budget
cluster_summaries.interpretation: The model hit the output budget or extraction ended with no usable artifact.
cluster_summaries.recommended_action: Count as model failure under the fixed baseline budget, but keep separate from Verilog-A competence.
